emails.subject: ISDA for Cowlitz PUD
emails.body: ISDA for Cowlitz PUD Tana, would you e-mail and US mail an ISDA to Mr. Gary A. Huhta c/o Cowlitz PUD, P.O. Box 3007, Longview WA, 98632. with an e-mail address of ghuhta@cowlitzpud.org If need be Gary's phone number (360) 577-7513. Thanks, John

emails.subject: ISDA for Cowlitz PUD
emails.body: ISDA for Cowlitz PUD Tana, would you e-mail and US mail an ISDA to Mr. Gary A. Huhta c/o Cowlitz PUD, P.O. Box 3007, Longview WA, 98632. with an e-mail address of ghuhta@cowlitzpud.org If need be Gary's phone number (360) 577-7513. Thanks, John

emails.subject: Re: ISDA for Cowlitz PUD
emails.body: Re: ISDA for Cowlitz PUD John, I've been out of the office for two days and just got in. I take it that Cowlitz PUD is a governmental entity? Our usual sample form does not have the governmental provisions. I would think we would want to send them a sample with those provisions in there, because they would be rather surprised if they got a draft from us at some point and it had all these additional provisions in there. Can you confirm for me that they are a governmental/quasi-governmental? Also, have you requested credit from Credit? John Malowney 07/17/2000 11:25 AM

emails.subject: Re: ISDA for Cowlitz PUD
emails.body: Re: ISDA for Cowlitz PUD John, I've been out of the office for two days and just got in. I take it that Cowlitz PUD is a governmental entity? Our usual sample form does not have the governmental provisions.
